_comment: Auto-updating 'currently building' strip for the living resume (#about). Each entry is FOUNDING WORK under the this.live LLC. Manually-authored seed; scripts/update-founder-living-resume.mjs refreshes `status`, `last_active`, and ordering from real repo/fleet activity. Keep `name`/`note` curated; the script will not overwrite prose.

building.name: Cortex Suite
building.note: Sovereign, fully-local agentic operating stack — the engine the whole portfolio runs on.

building.name: Maestro
building.note: Provider-agnostic model routing — proven live against a real fleet.

building.name: Mnemos
building.note: Project-scoped local memory plane — 75k+ memories in production.

building.name: Agent Fabric
building.note: Deterministic multi-agent execution spine with durable receipts.

building.name: Signal & Noise
building.note: AI podcast pipeline with persistent memory and voice cloning — production pipeline.

building.name: Beacon
building.note: Local-service lead generation — public surface live.

building.name: Surfaces
building.note: Pocket Agent, Personal Life OS, and Fleet Terminal converging into one desktop shell.

building.name: Forge
building.note: Adapter factory built end-to-end and gated — first measured local adapter is the milestone.

building.name: FTAG · Age of Arrows
building.note: Future Throwback Arcade Games — flagship Unity title in 6-agent parallel build.

building.name: Digital Products Lab
building.note: Turning live fleet work into blog, social, lead magnets, and operator products.

building.name: Fieldhouse Games
building.note: MiniMax team-backed studio for underserved mobile arcade sports.
